title: Scope Atoms
description: Create isolated capture contexts with scope atoms. Captures made inside a scope are discarded when the scope exits, preventing capture pollution.

motivation.why: Scopes prevent inner captures from polluting outer contexts. Essential for parsing nested structures where each level has its own context.
useCases: Parsing nested configuration with per-section captures
Recursive descent parsing without capture accumulation
Processing repeated structures with isolated state

inputFormat.description: Nested structures where inner contexts should be isolated.

outputFormat.description: Only captures from outer scope are preserved.

section.description: Section name persists to outer scope

key.description: Keys are isolated within each section scope

value.description: Values are isolated within each section scope
